subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath sent down the Book upon whomsoever He willeth among His servants. Verily, there is no God but Him, the Mighty, the All-Wise. We have indeed read the books that were sent down unto Us, and We do verily bear witness unto that which transpireth upon the earth, and God is the All-Informed, the All-Knowing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسمه العلی العظیم. الحمد لله الذی نزل الکتاب علی من یشاء من عباده و انه لا اله الا هو لعزیز حکیم و لقد قرئنا کتب التی نزلت الینا و انا نحن نشهد لما یحدث فی الارض والله خبیر علیم
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @justice and wrath of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
